grant_title: NYSG’s Special Research Call for 2027-2028: Inviting Letters of Intent for Research
project_area: marine, Hudson River estuary, and Great Lakes (including Great Rivers—Niagara and St. Lawrence) topics and issues
demographic_requirements: Open to researchers in New York State
eligibility_summary: Researchers in New York State are eligible to submit Letters of Intent for research projects aligned with NYSG's strategic plan goals.
